metadata.description: Marketplace hosting Power BI Forge — a Claude Code plugin for building Power BI dashboards with pbi-cli and open-source data.

plugins.name: powerbi-forge
plugins.description: Build awesome Power BI dashboards from Claude Code. Wraps the pbi-cli tool to model a star schema, author DAX, and lay out report pages, and pushes you toward free open-source APIs and databases for the data.
